result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 12:   JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.cre...
                                           ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_date,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c','owner assignment__c')
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL AND ownerid <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
),
handled_set AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hs.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_set hs
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hs.agent_id
WHERE hs.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hs.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_date,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c','owner assignment__c')
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL AND ownerid <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
),
handled_set AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hs.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_set hs
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hs.agent_id
WHERE hs.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hs.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT DATE '2022-04-10' AS start_date,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_date
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate >= p.start_date AND ch.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c','owner assignment__c')
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate >= p.start_date AND c.createddate < p.end_date
  WHERE ownerid IS NOT NULL AND ownerid <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
),
handled_set AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hs.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_set hs
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hs.agent_id
WHERE hs.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hs.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00' AS start_ts,
         TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00' AS end_ts
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(ch.oldvalue__c, '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(ch.newvalue__c, '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  JOIN params p ON ch.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND ch.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE lower(ch.field__c) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c','owner assignment__c')
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT old_owner AS agent_id, COUNT(*)::bigint AS transfer_count
  FROM assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL AND old_owner <> ''
  GROUP BY old_owner
),
handled_agents AS (
  SELECT regexp_replace(c.ownerid, '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND c.ownerid <> ''
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id
  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''
),
handled_set AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled_agents
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hs.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_set hs
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hs.agent_id
WHERE hs.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hs.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

),
assignments AS (

transfer_counts AS (

handled_agents AS (

  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN params p ON c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_ts
  WHERE c.ownerid IS NOT NULL AND c.ownerid <> ''
  UNION

  FROM assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL AND new_owner <> ''

handled_set AS (

SELECT hs.agent_id AS "Id"

LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hs.agent_id
WHERE hs.cases_handled > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hs.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
